---
pagetitle: "Simon Yan — Data Scientist & Software Engineer"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

<!-- ========== HERO ========== -->
::: {.hero-section}
::: {.hero-inner}

[Open to Opportunities]{.hero-label}

# [Your Name]{.hero-name}

[Data Scientist & Software Engineer crafting data-driven solutions that turn complex problems into clear, actionable insights.]{.hero-title}

::: {.hero-cta}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> View Resume](resume.qmd){.btn-primary-custom}
[<i class="bi bi-grid"></i> See My Work](projects.qmd){.btn-outline-custom}
:::

:::
:::

<!-- ========== STATS ========== -->
::: {.stats-strip}
::: {.stats-grid}

::: {.stat-item}
### 5+
Years of Experience
:::

::: {.stat-item}
### 20+
Projects Delivered
:::

::: {.stat-item}
### 10+
Publications & Talks
:::

::: {.stat-item}
### 3
Industries Served
:::

:::
:::

<!-- ========== FEATURED PROJECTS ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-white}
::: {.section-wide}

[Featured Work]{.section-label}

## Selected Projects {.section-heading}

A curated selection of projects showcasing my expertise in data science, machine learning, and software engineering.
{.section-desc}

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .blue}
<i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i>
:::

### Predictive Analytics Platform

Built an end-to-end ML pipeline for customer churn prediction, reducing churn rate by 18% and saving $2M annually through proactive intervention strategies.

::: {.tag-row}
[Python]{.tag} [Scikit-learn]{.tag} [AWS]{.tag} [Docker]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Live Demo](https://example.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .green}
<i class="bi bi-cpu"></i>
:::

### NLP Document Classifier

Developed a transformer-based document classification system processing 50K+ documents daily with 95% accuracy, deployed on Kubernetes.

::: {.tag-row}
[PyTorch]{.tag} [Transformers]{.tag} [FastAPI]{.tag} [K8s]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Paper](https://example.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .orange}
<i class="bi bi-bar-chart-line"></i>
:::

### Real-time Dashboard System

Designed interactive dashboards visualizing KPIs across 5 business units, enabling data-driven decisions for 200+ stakeholders.

::: {.tag-row}
[R Shiny]{.tag} [D3.js]{.tag} [PostgreSQL]{.tag} [REST API]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Live Demo](https://example.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

:::

<div class="text-center mt-3">
[View All Projects <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>](projects.qmd){.btn-outline-custom}
</div>

:::
:::


<!-- ========== SKILLS SNAPSHOT ========== -->
::: {.section}
::: {.section-wide}

[Expertise]{.section-label}

## Skills & Technologies {.section-heading}

::: {.skills-grid}

::: {.skill-category}
#### Programming Languages
::: {.skill-tags}
[Python]{.skill-tag} [R]{.skill-tag} [SQL]{.skill-tag} [JavaScript]{.skill-tag} [C++]{.skill-tag} [Bash]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category}
#### Machine Learning & AI
::: {.skill-tags}
[PyTorch]{.skill-tag} [TensorFlow]{.skill-tag} [Scikit-learn]{.skill-tag} [Hugging Face]{.skill-tag} [XGBoost]{.skill-tag} [LLMs]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category}
#### Data Engineering
::: {.skill-tags}
[Spark]{.skill-tag} [Airflow]{.skill-tag} [PostgreSQL]{.skill-tag} [MongoDB]{.skill-tag} [Redis]{.skill-tag} [Kafka]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category}
#### Cloud & DevOps
::: {.skill-tags}
[AWS]{.skill-tag} [Docker]{.skill-tag} [Kubernetes]{.skill-tag} [CI/CD]{.skill-tag} [Terraform]{.skill-tag} [Git]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

:::
:::
:::


<!-- ========== CTA ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-white .text-center}
::: {.section-narrow}

## Let's Work Together {.section-heading}

I'm currently seeking new opportunities in data science and machine learning engineering. If you're looking for someone passionate about turning data into impact, I'd love to connect.
{.section-desc style="margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;"}

::: {.hero-cta}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Get in Touch](contact.qmd){.btn-primary-custom}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com){.btn-outline-custom target="_blank"}
:::

:::
:::
